text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Listen. Can we take a bit of a detour?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do you mind if we go for a short stroll
around here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, we're about to return to the
academy as per usual when Mejiro Dober makes a
sudden request. Naturally, I give an approving
nod.
choice_data_list: (I guess there's something she wants to do.)
(I guess there's something she wants to do.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, we're about to return to the
academy as per usual when Mejiro Dober makes a
sudden request. Naturally, I give an approving
nod.
choice_data_list: (I guess there's something she wants to do.)
(I guess there's something she wants to do.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I can't believe such amazing scenery is so
short a walk off the beaten track...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...
I wonder where we'll end up if we keep following
this river.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Although this outfit isn't exactly ideal for walking
on rocky terrain.
choice_data_list: Shall we turn back, then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...No, I'd like to keep going. We've already come
this far.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let's look for a spot with stable footing and see
how much further we can go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Whoa, the ocean!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I know it's only natural that the river would
connect to the ocean somewhere, but actually
seeing it... It's so stunning.
choice_data_list:
Want to head down to the water's edge while
we're here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We decided to go as far as the path
could take us, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, it's cold! But it feels really nice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look! A group of hermit crabs!
...I wonder if there's something among those
rocks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's dim and a bit mysterious... If this were a film
or a comic, I bet we'd find something amazing
washed up there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober continues to dart back and forth
between anything and everything that piques her
curiosity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm exhausted... I guess I overdid it a little
bit.
choice_data_list: You had even more fun than usual today.
You had even more fun than usual today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...And you stuck around the whole time. You
could have just gone home on your own, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Aha, I guess. Thanks for sticking with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This outfit I'm wearing today... It was actually a
present from Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was fretting over something small when she sent
it to me, along with a letter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
"Have more confidence! Do your best to have fun
and enjoy life," it said.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That letter was a huge source of encouragement
for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Remember when I decided to keep going along
the river?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm sure the old me would have turned back there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But today... I took a step forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It felt a bit like someone was giving me a little
push.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we ended up here, after making
all sorts of exciting discoveries along the way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Somehow... Wearing this dress makes me feel like
I could go anywhere.
choice_data_list: That means Ryan got her wish.
That means Ryan got her wish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I wonder. ...I do hope so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I'm glad I've got something good to
report.
choice_data_list: "Report"?
"Report"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Now I'll be able to deliver a good report!
choice_data_list: "Report"?
"Report"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to tell Ryan about everything that's
happened today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to tell Ryan about everything that's
happened today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want her to know how much fun I've been
having, exploring all kinds of places in this dress.
I think that's the best way to thank her... Don't
you agree?
choice_data_list:
Then we've got to make sure we have a blast
today!

Then we've got to make sure we have a blast
today!
Are you okay with just giving a report?
Are you okay with just giving a report?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want her to know how much fun I've been
having, exploring all kinds of places in this dress.
I think that's the best way to thank her... Don't
you agree?
choice_data_list:
Then we've got to make sure we have a blast
today!

Then we've got to make sure we have a blast
today!
Are you okay with just giving a report?
Are you okay with just giving a report?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I don't need you to tell me that.
choice_data_list: Just try not to go overboard!
Just try not to go overboard!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right. It's about time for round two. We still
haven't explored that area over there!
choice_data_list: Just try not to go overboard!
Just try not to go overboard!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I'll do nothing of the sort! I know very well
how to control myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh oh, perhaps I am getting a little too excited... Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you listening?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But... I guess that goes to show how much fun this
has been. Nothing wrong with being a bit excited!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I'm truly pleased to see that she's
enjoying herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I'm truly pleased to see that she's
enjoying herself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hm? What do you mean by that?
choice_data_list: Why not invite Ryan out with you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, I'm sure Ryan's far too busy for that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I would love to, of course, but I'm sure Ryan's far
too busy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but perhaps she'd get a better feel for the
experience that way than through reading a report...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but perhaps she'd get a better feel for the
experience that way than through reading a report...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I-I guess I'll ask her whether she's free. That
doesn't mean I'll invite her out if she is, though!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. Thanks for the advice! I'll ask
Ryan whether she's free!
